name: python_run_script
description: Run a .py script from any data layer (domain_data, my_data, or common). Pass script_path relative to the section root. Searches ALL three layers by default — tries domain_data first, then my_data, then common. IMPORTANT: When the user mentions a .py script by name (e.g. 'run stats_calculator.py'), call this tool DIRECTLY with the script name as script_path — do NOT search for it first.
